title: Enna Oru Enna Oru Lyrics Pattathu Yaanai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Enna Oru Enna Oru
Singer: Karthik
Movie: Pattathu Yaanai
Music: Thaman S
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Enna oru enna oru azhagiyada
kanna vittu kanna vittu vilagalada

Manasa thaakura minnalum avathaan
marayil theriyura jannalum avathaan
kanavil pookura thaamara avathaan
kadhayil ketkura dhevadha avathaan

Enna peru enna oosru ketkalada
enga pora enga poraa paakalada

Munnadi avalum pinnaadi naanum
oru murai thirumbi paarthaa enna
Thundaana manasa onnaaka thaaney
marupadi avala keteney

Enna oru enna oru azhagiyada
kanna vittu kanna vittu vilagalada

Raavu kaalathula nalla neram varuma
onbathu patharayil sirichaa
pillayaaru kovilukku thenga
onnu udaikka manasu venduchu pudhusaa

Inchu inchaa idaiveli kuranji
idhayam parakudhu lesaa
England-u raani pola thangathula elachu
vazha vaipen mass-aa

Avalai paarkira yaarumey avalai
marandhum kooda marapadhu siramam
Peepi oodhanum neratha solladi
BP yerudhu seekiram solladi

Enna oru enna oru azhagiyada
kanna vittu kanna vittu vilagalada
va enazhage va en uyire
va en mayiley .. oh oh ..
va uyire  va en enazhage
va en mayiley .. oh oh .. va

Oh... thillai nagaraa theradi theruvaa
angirukka un veedu
Saradhas-u koorapattu sela vangi tharuven
vetkapattu ennai thaedu

Thannanthaniya vazhvadhu paavam
vandhu maalaya podu
thandavaalam pola naama
rendu perukidayil naduvil
edhukadi kodu

Manasil kattura maaliga veedu
vaasal kolam vandhu ne podu

Peepi oodhanum neratha solladi
BP yerudhu seekiram solladi

Enna oru ... azhagiyada
kanna vittu .. vilagalada
konjam kooda konjam kooda palagalada
engaluku ippa rendu kuzhandhayada

va enazhage va en uyire
va en mayiley .. oh oh ..
va uyire . va en enazhage
va en mayiley .. oh oh .. va

ha ha.. kiruku payapulla ...English Translation

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Enna Oru Enna Oru'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and admiration, showcasing the beauty of romantic emotions.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Pattathu Yaanai'?

This song is featured in a romantic setting, highlighting the protagonist's feelings towards their love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Karthik and composed by Thaman S.

When was 'Enna Oru Enna Oru' released?

The song was released on June 24, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Enna Oru Enna Oru', the protagonist expresses their profound love and admiration, making it a quintessential romantic ballad. The song's lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, evoke a sense of longing and joy, perfectly complemented by Karthik's soothing voice. Set against the backdrop of the film Pattathu Yaanai, it captures the essence of love's beauty and complexity. This melody is sure to resonate with anyone celebrating love and affection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enna Oru Enna Oru from Pattathu Yaanai is a melodious romantic track that beautifully captures the essence of love. With Karthik's soulful vocals and Thaman S's captivating music, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. Dive into the enchanting world of this song that perfectly blends heartfelt lyrics and a memorable melody.
stanzaMeanings: What a beautiful sight it is, leaving the eyes and wandering away.
The mind is like a lightning bolt, it knows the hidden window, it blooms like a lotus in dreams, it hears the stories of the gods.
What is my name, what is this noise, where are we going, where are we headed?
In front, she is there, behind, I am there, if I turn around once, my restless heart will only hear her again.
What a beautiful sight it is, leaving the eyes and wandering away.
In the evening, will a good time come? If the child laughs at the temple of Pillaiyar, I want to break a coconut, is that new?
Inch by inch, the heart is getting closer, like the queen of England, I will live in gold.
Whoever sees her, even if they forget, they cannot forget her beauty, tell me the time of the peepal tree, BP is rising, tell me quickly.
What a beautiful sight it is, leaving the eyes and wandering away, oh my life, oh my beauty, oh my life, oh my beauty, oh oh, come.
Oh... in Thillai Nagar, on the street, your house is there, I will buy it after asking Sharadha, come find me.
Living alone is a pity, give me a garland, like we are in the middle of two people, why is there a burden?
Decorate the entrance of the house with a beautiful design, come and place it there.
Tell me the time of the peepal tree, BP is rising, tell me quickly.
What a beautiful sight it is, leaving the eyes and wandering away, just a little, just a little, it is our two children now.
Oh my beauty, oh my life, oh my beauty, oh oh, come, oh my life, oh my beauty, oh oh, come.
Ha ha.. a mischievous child... I tried my best :)
